en.duty_help: Choose your department and enter your current duty identity.
en.duty_pending: Your duty request is being checked.
en.emergency_help: Describe the emergency clearly. Your current location will be attached automatically.
en.emergency_placeholder: Describe what happened, who is involved, and any immediate danger...
en.emergency_sent: Your 911 call was sent to emergency services.

en.force_off_wait: Please wait before trying another force-off action.
en.forced_off: A supervisor forced you off duty.
en.invalid_emergency: The emergency call contained invalid information.
en.invalid_identity: Name, callsign, or rank is invalid.
en.invalid_panic: The panic alert contained invalid location information.
en.missing_fields: Complete every field before going on duty.
en.missing_report: Enter details about the emergency before sending the call.
en.must_be_on_duty: You must be on duty to use the panic button.
en.name: Name
en.no_department_permission: You do not have permission for %s.
en.no_officers: No on-duty officers match this view.
en.no_supervisor_access: You do not have supervisor access.
en.officer_not_on_duty: That officer is no longer on duty.
en.panic_sent: Panic alert transmitted to all on-duty officers.
en.search_officers: Search name, callsign, rank, or department
en.server_no_response: The server did not respond. Please try again.
en.supervisor_unavailable: The supervisor panel is unavailable because Discord credentials are not configured.
en.unable_contact: Unable to contact the duty system.
en.unable_duty_request: Unable to submit the duty request.
en.unable_force_off: Unable to send the force-off request.
en.wait_seconds: Please wait %s seconds before trying again.
